posts.author: YanivGershman (Yaniv Gershman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

Today on Monday when you create automation that using office 365 to send email on different triggers creates 3 different alerts/notifications:

  1. Email - Original propuse
  2. Chat notification (Updates) + email from Monday
  3. Notification on Monday
  • when the trigger is ‘People’ for each person add min 1 alert for 3 persons the user will receive 9 emails

My suggestion is to add on automation solution for ‘Email’ is to have pop-up to choose Email/Email+updates/Email + Updates + Notification

Today it not asking the user only give the user to uncheck some notification but it create different issue on other boards

Thanks
Yaniv Gershman
